title: Retrieval Augmented Generation for Scientific Search
abstract: This paper studies retrieval augmented generation for scientific literature search and proposes a citation-aware retrieval framework for research papers.
text_for_retrieval: Retrieval Augmented Generation for Scientific Search. This paper studies retrieval augmented generation for scientific literature search and proposes a citation-aware retrieval framework for research papers.

title: A Survey of Scientific Paper Recommendation
abstract: This survey reviews scientific paper recommendation, citation recommendation, and academic search systems with emphasis on graph-based and content-based methods.
text_for_retrieval: A Survey of Scientific Paper Recommendation. This survey reviews scientific paper recommendation, citation recommendation, and academic search systems with emphasis on graph-based and content-based methods.

title: Improving Citation Graph Retrieval with LLM Reranking
abstract: We extend citation graph retrieval by adding an LLM reranker that improves relevance, evidence grounding, and explanation quality for academic recommendation.
text_for_retrieval: Improving Citation Graph Retrieval with LLM Reranking. We extend citation graph retrieval by adding an LLM reranker that improves relevance, evidence grounding, and explanation quality for academic recommendation.

title: Limitations of LLM-based Scientific Recommendation
abstract: This work critiques LLM-based scientific recommendation systems and analyzes hallucination, weak evidence support, and failure modes in citation-grounded generation.
text_for_retrieval: Limitations of LLM-based Scientific Recommendation. This work critiques LLM-based scientific recommendation systems and analyzes hallucination, weak evidence support, and failure modes in citation-grounded generation.

title: Graph Neural Networks for Citation Prediction
abstract: We apply graph neural networks to citation prediction using structural features and benchmark datasets from computer science literature.
text_for_retrieval: Graph Neural Networks for Citation Prediction. We apply graph neural networks to citation prediction using structural features and benchmark datasets from computer science literature.

title: Neural Machine Translation with Attention
abstract: This foundational paper introduces attention mechanisms for neural machine translation and sequence modeling tasks.
text_for_retrieval: Neural Machine Translation with Attention. This foundational paper introduces attention mechanisms for neural machine translation and sequence modeling tasks.
